```yaml
    apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
    kind: Gateway
    metadata:
      name: cn-http-gateway
      namespace: cluster-ingress
    spec:
      selector:
        app: istio-ingress
        istio: ingress
      servers:
      - port:
          number: 443
          name: https
          protocol: HTTPS
        tls:
          mode: SIMPLE
          credentialName: cn-net-tls # name of the secret created above
        hosts:
        - "*.YOUR_HOSTNAME"
        - "YOUR_HOSTNAME"
      - port:
          number: 80
          name: http
          protocol: HTTP
        tls:
          httpsRedirect: true
        hosts:
        - "*.YOUR_HOSTNAME"
        - "YOUR_HOSTNAME"


```
